description: Call to Arms Patch 4 (Balance Patch) (6 May 2021) — Hellgate Changes, Faction Warfare Changes, 20v20 Crystal League Changes, Changes to Black Zone Elite/Veteran Fame Buff, Mobile Changes, Duel Changes, Other Changes and Improvements, Combat Balance Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Hellgate Changes

subsections.heading: Hellgate rewards
subsections.searchable_text: Hellgate rewards

subsections.heading: Infamy

items.text: Significantly increased rewards across all non-lethal and lethal Hellgate modes
A chest will now always appear at the portal after any Hellgate is completed, either by killing the opposing team or collecting sufficient Infamy from killing mobs

subitems.text: These chests can be Common, Uncommon, Rare or Legendary

items.text: Increased the value of Uncommon, Rare, and Legendary chests in Hellgates
Contents of PvP reward chests are now boosted by Infamy, as well as containing the value the non-PvP chest would have contained
All Cooldowns (including capes) now reset instantly for both teams when a Hellgate is invaded, and Health and energy are replenished as well
Removed delay in matchmaking for chained Hellgates to remove any benefit from waiting in a Hellgate instead of progressing for more loot
Knocked-down players on a winning team now get up immediately when the losing team is eliminated
Knocked-down players on a losing team are now shielded and get up immediately when removed from a Hellgate
Added additional bigger entrance to final combat area in "The Ritual" map to make it more challenging to defend

sections.heading: Faction Warfare Changes

items.text: Faction Warfare respawns now occur in batches to help rally respawning forces

subitems.text: As respawning now waits for the next available timeslot, base respawn times have been reduced from 24s to 16s, leaving average base times relatively unchanged

items.text: The Bandit Assault in the red zones now occurs more frequently, as well as more unpredictably, and no longer starts between 08:30 and 09:00 UTC
Added new Hotkey to open Faction Warfare UI (Default: Shift + F)
Faction Standing Upkeep is now shown in the Weekly Report

sections.searchable_text: Faction Warfare Changes Faction Warfare respawns now occur in batches to help rally respawning forces As respawning now waits for the next available timeslot, base respawn times have been reduced from 24s to 16s, leaving average base times relatively unchanged The Bandit Assault in the red zones now occurs more frequently, as well as more unpredictably, and no longer starts between 08:30 and 09:00 UTC Added new Hotkey to open Faction Warfare UI (Default: Shift + F) Faction Standing Upkeep is now shown in the Weekly Report

sections.heading: 20v20 Crystal League Changes

items.text: Dramatically improved the value of artifacts in reward chests after matches. The amount of artifacts has not been reduced, increasing overall chest values drastically. Chests now contain artifacts of the following tiers exclusively
Reduced Season Points for winning Level 1 matches, to make it more worthwhile to participate in Levels 2+ in comparison

subitems.text: Season Points for winning Level 1 20v20 match: 5 → 2

stats.name: Season Points for winning Level 1 20v20 match

items.text: Reduced starting points for each team to lower the overall gear cost per match, as shorter matches also means fewer casualties on both sides

sections.searchable_text: 20v20 Crystal League Changes Dramatically improved the value of artifacts in reward chests after matches. The amount of artifacts has not been reduced, increasing overall chest values drastically. Chests now contain artifacts of the following tiers exclusively Rune Artifacts: T7 or higher Soul Artifacts: T6 or higher Relic Artifacts: T5 or higher Avalonian Artifacts: all tiers Reduced Season Points for winning Level 1 matches, to make it more worthwhile to participate in Levels 2+ in comparison Season Points for winning Level 1 20v20 match: 5 → 2 Reduced starting points for each team to lower the overall gear cost per match, as shorter matches also means fewer casualties on both sides Starting Points per Team: 250 → 200

sections.heading: Changes to Black Zone Elite/Veteran Fame Buff

items.text: Buff now persists when moving between black-zone regions
Buff is removed if leaving the black zone, with the following rules

subitems.text: For this buff, Randomized and Static Dungeons entered via black zone entrances are considered black zones
The buff will thus not be removed when entering these dungeons, though it will drop off naturally after 10 minutes
For this buff, Roads of Avalon, Hellgates, and Corrupted Dungeons are not considered black zones, even if entered from a black zone, and will thus cancel the buff immediately

sections.searchable_text: Changes to Black Zone Elite/Veteran Fame Buff Buff now persists when moving between black-zone regions Overall duration reduced to 10 minutes (900s → 600s) Buff is removed if leaving the black zone, with the following rules For this buff, Randomized and Static Dungeons entered via black zone entrances are considered black zones The buff will thus not be removed when entering these dungeons, though it will drop off naturally after 10 minutes For this buff, Roads of Avalon, Hellgates, and Corrupted Dungeons are not considered black zones, even if entered from a black zone, and will thus cancel the buff immediately

sections.heading: Mobile Changes

items.text: Optimizations to region loading (should result in faster loading times for various devices)
Characters under effects ended by interactions must now pick up Silver manually, to correct an issue where auto-pickup could end buffs unintentionally

sections.searchable_text: Mobile Changes Optimizations to region loading (should result in faster loading times for various devices) Characters under effects ended by interactions must now pick up Silver manually, to correct an issue where auto-pickup could end buffs unintentionally Various additional UI optimizations

sections.heading: Duel Changes

items.text: Shrines can no longer be used during duels
Leaving the duel area during the countdown is now considered a Draw (previously a Loss)
Duels can no longer be initiated with opponents at different height levels

sections.searchable_text: Duel Changes Shrines can no longer be used during duels Leaving the duel area during the countdown is now considered a Draw (previously a Loss) Duels can no longer be initiated with opponents at different height levels

sections.heading: Other Changes and Improvements

items.text: Reduced loading times when transitioning between zones on all platforms
Reworked visual effects of dropped Silver and Loot Bags for improved visibility

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes and Improvements Reduced loading times when transitioning between zones on all platforms Reworked visual effects of dropped Silver and Loot Bags for improved visibility

sections.heading: Combat Balance Changes

subsections.heading: Arcane Staffs

subitems.text: Max Enemy targets to get an Aura: 5 → 3

stats.name: Max Enemy targets to get an Aura

subsections.searchable_text: Arcane Staffs Black Hole (Witchwork Staff) Cast Range: 11m → 14m Dark Sphere (Evensong) Max Enemy targets to get an Aura: 5 → 3 Healing Received Reduction: 20% → 25% Damage Reduction vs players: 20% → 25% Damage Reduction vs mobs: 8% → 12%

subsections.heading: Axes

subitems.text: Rending Bleed stacks: now only applied via max distance effect (i.e. 2.5m or further away)
Now also increases Attack Speed by 40%
However, if the caster doesn't hit an enemy with a Normal Attack for 2.5s, the Adrenaline Boost now ends early
Improved detection of moving versus standing still on affected enemies
Now hits in a ring around the caster, instead of a solid circle (Inner Radius: 2.5m / Outer Radius: 6m)

items.text: Vampiric Strike (Battleaxe) - reworked the ability; now called "Blood Bandit"

subitems.text: Throw your axe in the targeted direction. Deals physical damage to all enemies hit and slows by 20% for 2s. Steal a percentage of the Health enemies lose based on Rending Bleed Charges on the targets.
Damage per tick vs Players: 50 → 75 (Damage per tick vs Mobs unchanged)
Instead the ability now consumes 4 energy per tick while channeling (total of 24 energy for full channel duration)

Deals physical damage to all enemies hit and slows by 20% for 2s. Steal a percentage of the Health enemies lose based on Rending Bleed Charges on the targets. Throw Range: 22m → 17m Whirlwind (Greataxe) Channeling time: 4.5s → 2.5s Damage per tick vs Players: 50 → 75 (Damage per tick vs Mobs unchanged) Cooldown: 20s → 25s Channel is now uninterruptible Energy Cost on activation: 21 → 0 Instead the ability now consumes 4 energy per tick while channeling (total of 24 energy for full channel duration) Razor Cut (Bear Paws) Standtime: 0s → 0.3s

Reduced size of projectile hitbox; adjusted projectile position to better match it

subsections.heading: Cursed Staffs

subitems.text: Now consumes Vile Curse stacks for additional AoE damage per tick
For each tick that consumes a stack, the beam deals 72 magic damage in a 4m radius (instead of the base tick damage of 36 to only the beam target)
Max Jump Distance to next enemy: 8m → 9m

stats.name: Max Jump Distance to next enemy

subitems.text: Damage can no longer be reflected

subsections.searchable_text: Cursed Staffs Vile Curse (all Cursed Staffs) Cast Range: 9m → 11m Armor Piercer (all Cursed Staffs) Resistance Reduction: 0.2 → 0.17 Debuff Duration: 5s → 4s Cursed Beam (all Cursed Staffs) Now consumes Vile Curse stacks for additional AoE damage per tick For each tick that consumes a stack, the beam deals 72 magic damage in a 4m radius (instead of the base tick damage of 36 to only the beam target) Tick Interval: 1s → 0.5s Total Ticks: 5 → 10 Damage per Tick: 72 → 36 Dark Matter (all Cursed Staffs) Damage vs Players: 65.88 → 78 Damage vs Mobs: 32.94 → 36.7 Cast Time: 1s → 0.5s Cast Range: 11m → 13m Max Jump Distance to next enemy: 8m → 9m Haunting Screams (Cursed Skull) Damage can no longer be reflected Magic Damage per tick: 25 → 33

subsections.heading: Daggers

subitems.text: Reduced all direct and bleed damage by 7%

subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Slit Throat (Dagger Pair) Cast Time: 0.3s → 0.4s Reduced all direct and bleed damage by 7% Lunging Stabs (Bloodletter) Standtime: 0s → 0.35s

subsections.heading: Fire Staffs

subitems.text: Cone area now quickly swipes from left to right, covering more horizontal space
Enemies hit now receive an additional 75 magic damage if any Q-slot DoT is active on them

subsections.searchable_text: Fire Staffs Fire Wave (all Fire Staffs) Cone area now quickly swipes from left to right, covering more horizontal space Enemies hit now receive an additional 75 magic damage if any Q-slot DoT is active on them

subsections.heading: Frost Staffs

subitems.text: Splash Damage to other enemies in the AoE 150 → 110
Area no longer roots instantly - instead applies 3 cc stacks in quick succession
Stacks: 1 / 2 / 3 → Effect: Slows 15% / Slows 30% / Roots for 2.5s

items.text: Heavy Cleave (all Hammers) - ability is now called "Heavy Smash"

Now deals more damage directly at the Hammer impact spot
Damage at the center of the impact: 271.95 → 290

subitems.text: The first Explosion now also gives a resistance buff to allies, increasing resistances by 0.2 for 3s
Instead the ability consumes 3.6 energy per tick while channeling (total of 18 energy for the full channel)
Tick Interval: 0.5s → 0.6s (amount of ticks stays the same, so total channel time increases)

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs

subitems.text: Now has an instant heal effect instead of heal over time
Heal amount is dependent on Rejuvenation Stacks on each target
Removes one Rejuvenation Stack of each ally healed
The spell can now be recast again within 2.5s, but stacking it twice on the same target will override the first cast
Touching the Spirit Animal itself now instantly heals 60
Base Heal Value of the Area per Tick: 8 → 12

subsections.heading: Armors

Area now keeps damaging enemies even if the caster is invulnerable or shielded
Burn Damage vs Players: 66 true damage → 2% of enemy's max health
Burn Damage vs mounted players is now the same as against mobs (no percent-based damage)

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Fixed an issue where Hellgate chest colors did not match their actual rarities
Arena stats are now displayed in the Stats UI as intended
Fixed an issue where galloping sound would disappear while still galloping
Fixed an issue where a Faction Campaign started the previous month would not progress on the first day of a new month
T4 Avalonian Cloth Shoes are now part of the T4 Avalonian Artifact Loot list at the Artifact Foundry
Spectral Trident (Trinity Spear) tooltip updated to show correct number of possible affected allies (previously 5, now 10)
Fixed a visual issue where the red indicator of Vendetta (Camlann Mace) would change depending on player size
Fixed an issue where Separator (Quarterstaffs) could be used without the Destiny Board unlock
Fixed an issue where Divine Intervention (Hallowfall) could heal healing-immune targets
Added missing localization strings for farmable Moose and Moose Calf
Additional graphical, audio, animation, terrain, UI, and localization fixes
